targets.expr: $usd_cad * ((((sum(increase(litellm_input_tokens_metric_total{requested_model=~"chatgpt/.*"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) * 5.0 + (sum(increase(litellm_output_tokens_metric_total{requested_model=~"chatgpt/.*"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) * 30.0) / 1e6) + (((sum(increase(litellm_input_tokens_metric_total{requested_model=~"dsv4f|dsv4p|kimi-k2.6|go-minimax-m3|go-minimax-m2.7|mimo-v2.5|mimo-v2.5-pro|qwen3.7-plus"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) * 0.4 + (sum(increase(litellm_output_tokens_metric_total{requested_model=~"dsv4f|dsv4p|kimi-k2.6|go-minimax-m3|go-minimax-m2.7|mimo-v2.5|mimo-v2.5-pro|qwen3.7-plus"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) * 1.5) / 1e6) + (((sum(increase(litellm_input_tokens_metric_total{requested_model=~"glm-5.1|glm-5.2"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) * 0.6 + (sum(increase(litellm_output_tokens_metric_total{requested_model=~"glm-5.1|glm-5.2"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) * 2.0) / 1e6) + (((sum(increase(litellm_input_tokens_metric_total{requested_model=~"MiniMax|MiniMax-M2.7"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) * 0.3 + (sum(increase(litellm_output_tokens_metric_total{requested_model=~"MiniMax|MiniMax-M2.7"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) * 1.2) / 1e6) + (((sum(increase(litellm_input_tokens_metric_total{requested_model=~"self-hosted|nvidia|ryzen|qwen3-embedding-0-6b"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) * 0.4 + (sum(increase(litellm_output_tokens_metric_total{requested_model=~"self-hosted|nvidia|ryzen|qwen3-embedding-0-6b"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) * 1.2) / 1e6) + ((sum(increase(litellm_spend_metric_total{api_provider="moonshot"}[$__range])) or vector(0))))

targets.expr: ($usd_cad * ((((sum(increase(litellm_input_tokens_metric_total{requested_model=~"chatgpt/.*"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) * 5.0 + (sum(increase(litellm_output_tokens_metric_total{requested_model=~"chatgpt/.*"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) * 30.0) / 1e6) + (((sum(increase(litellm_input_tokens_metric_total{requested_model=~"dsv4f|dsv4p|kimi-k2.6|go-minimax-m3|go-minimax-m2.7|mimo-v2.5|mimo-v2.5-pro|qwen3.7-plus"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) * 0.4 + (sum(increase(litellm_output_tokens_metric_total{requested_model=~"dsv4f|dsv4p|kimi-k2.6|go-minimax-m3|go-minimax-m2.7|mimo-v2.5|mimo-v2.5-pro|qwen3.7-plus"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) * 1.5) / 1e6) + (((sum(increase(litellm_input_tokens_metric_total{requested_model=~"glm-5.1|glm-5.2"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) * 0.6 + (sum(increase(litellm_output_tokens_metric_total{requested_model=~"glm-5.1|glm-5.2"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) * 2.0) / 1e6) + (((sum(increase(litellm_input_tokens_metric_total{requested_model=~"MiniMax|MiniMax-M2.7"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) * 0.3 + (sum(increase(litellm_output_tokens_metric_total{requested_model=~"MiniMax|MiniMax-M2.7"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) * 1.2) / 1e6) + (((sum(increase(litellm_input_tokens_metric_total{requested_model=~"self-hosted|nvidia|ryzen|qwen3-embedding-0-6b"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) * 0.4 + (sum(increase(litellm_output_tokens_metric_total{requested_model=~"self-hosted|nvidia|ryzen|qwen3-embedding-0-6b"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) * 1.2) / 1e6) + ((sum(increase(litellm_spend_metric_total{api_provider="moonshot"}[$__range])) or vector(0))))) * (${days_in_month} * 86400 / $__range_s)

targets.expr: (($usd_cad * ((((sum(increase(litellm_input_tokens_metric_total{requested_model=~"chatgpt/.*"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) * 5.0 + (sum(increase(litellm_output_tokens_metric_total{requested_model=~"chatgpt/.*"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) * 30.0) / 1e6) + (((sum(increase(litellm_input_tokens_metric_total{requested_model=~"dsv4f|dsv4p|kimi-k2.6|go-minimax-m3|go-minimax-m2.7|mimo-v2.5|mimo-v2.5-pro|qwen3.7-plus"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) * 0.4 + (sum(increase(litellm_output_tokens_metric_total{requested_model=~"dsv4f|dsv4p|kimi-k2.6|go-minimax-m3|go-minimax-m2.7|mimo-v2.5|mimo-v2.5-pro|qwen3.7-plus"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) * 1.5) / 1e6) + (((sum(increase(litellm_input_tokens_metric_total{requested_model=~"glm-5.1|glm-5.2"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) * 0.6 + (sum(increase(litellm_output_tokens_metric_total{requested_model=~"glm-5.1|glm-5.2"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) * 2.0) / 1e6) + (((sum(increase(litellm_input_tokens_metric_total{requested_model=~"MiniMax|MiniMax-M2.7"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) * 0.3 + (sum(increase(litellm_output_tokens_metric_total{requested_model=~"MiniMax|MiniMax-M2.7"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) * 1.2) / 1e6) + (((sum(increase(litellm_input_tokens_metric_total{requested_model=~"self-hosted|nvidia|ryzen|qwen3-embedding-0-6b"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) * 0.4 + (sum(increase(litellm_output_tokens_metric_total{requested_model=~"self-hosted|nvidia|ryzen|qwen3-embedding-0-6b"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) * 1.2) / 1e6) + ((sum(increase(litellm_spend_metric_total{api_provider="moonshot"}[$__range])) or vector(0))))) * (${days_in_month} * 86400 / $__range_s)) - ($sub_chatgpt + ($sub_opencode + $sub_minimax + $sub_glm) * $usd_cad)

Subscription vs API — projected monthly savings per bucket

panels.description: Projected full-month API-equivalent cost of each bucket's tokens minus its flat fee. Positive = the subscription / self-hosting saves you money.

targets.expr: label_replace((($usd_cad * (((sum(increase(litellm_input_tokens_metric_total{requested_model=~"chatgpt/.*"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) * 5.0 + (sum(increase(litellm_output_tokens_metric_total{requested_model=~"chatgpt/.*"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) * 30.0) / 1e6)) * (${days_in_month} * 86400 / $__range_s) - ($sub_chatgpt)), "bucket", "ChatGPT Plus", "", "")

label_replace((($usd_cad * (((sum(increase(litellm_input_tokens_metric_total{requested_model=~"dsv4f|dsv4p|kimi-k2.6|go-minimax-m3|go-minimax-m2.7|mimo-v2.5|mimo-v2.5-pro|qwen3.7-plus"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) * 0.4 + (sum(increase(litellm_output_tokens_metric_total{requested_model=~"dsv4f|dsv4p|kimi-k2.6|go-minimax-m3|go-minimax-m2.7|mimo-v2.5|mimo-v2.5-pro|qwen3.7-plus"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) * 1.5) / 1e6)) * (${days_in_month} * 86400 / $__range_s) - ($sub_opencode * $usd_cad)), "bucket", "Opencode Go", "", "")

label_replace((($usd_cad * (((sum(increase(litellm_input_tokens_metric_total{requested_model=~"glm-5.1|glm-5.2"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) * 0.6 + (sum(increase(litellm_output_tokens_metric_total{requested_model=~"glm-5.1|glm-5.2"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) * 2.0) / 1e6)) * (${days_in_month} * 86400 / $__range_s) - ($sub_glm * $usd_cad)), "bucket", "GLM Coding Lite", "", "")

label_replace((($usd_cad * (((sum(increase(litellm_input_tokens_metric_total{requested_model=~"MiniMax|MiniMax-M2.7"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) * 0.3 + (sum(increase(litellm_output_tokens_metric_total{requested_model=~"MiniMax|MiniMax-M2.7"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) * 1.2) / 1e6)) * (${days_in_month} * 86400 / $__range_s) - ($sub_minimax * $usd_cad)), "bucket", "MiniMax Plus", "", "")
